title: client version too old
body:
my questions： cant use skopeo in ubuntu22.04；
Syncing image: hardened-addon-resizer:1.8.20-build20240410
FATA[0000] initializing source docker-daemon:hardened-addon-resizer:1.8.20-build20240410: loading image from docker engine: Error response from daemon: {"message":"client version 1.22 is too old. Minimum supported API version is 1.24, please upgrade your client to a newer version"} 
Failed to sync: hardened-addon-resizer:1.8.20-build20240410. Retrying...

I use skopeo copy；
and my docker info is following：



Client: Docker Engine - Community

I would  be  grateful  if you  can  solve  the  problem

comments.body:
Thanks for your report.

What is the version of Skopeo? This was fixed in Skopeo 1.14.2; if the distribution is shipping an earlier version, you need to talk to them to update (if it is consistent with the policies of that release). Or, alternatively, run Skopeo in a container, or maybe compile it yourself.
